item.title: I Cried A Little
item.description: After 11 years of paying off my student debt from Nursing and Graphic Design, it's finally over! I finally paid off the last chunk today and it's like an immense weight has been lifted off my shoulders. I can finally focus on putting everything into a down payment to purchase a house and put myself into a deeper debt. -- Front page Edit: Send me snoots to boop! If you're interested in seeing what my transition from Nursing to Graphic design looks like be sure to visit my portfolio! https://www.kasianortheast.com/
item.dc:creator: SnootBooper

item.title: Comparison of James Webb telescope images with other telescopes
item.description: This is the same place in neighboring galaxy Large Magellanic Cloud. It was imaged by three different infrared observatories: WISE, Spitzer and JWST credit: Andras Gaspar source: https://twitter.com/AndrasGaspar/status/1520184730985148418

item.dc:creator: LetsGoBidenFckOffBrandon

item.title: Toxic shit right here
item.description: I remember the lesson of tape. Anyone else? That every person you have sex with pulls tape off of you- like your soul, personhood, inner self. And the more you let them “take” you away from yourself, you end up nothing. How absolutely barbaric. And idiotic. And nonsensical. Further rant… my folks never had the talk with me because they “didn’t think they’d have to with me.” So, years later when I was assaulted, I of course didn’t go to them. And this whole idea of being dirty, or soiled, or less than (UNLESS you’re with a loving partner and that’s your jam- to each their own). Teaching my kids all the terms. Open conversation over here. Everyone wants sex (I guess unless you’re asexual, so excuse me for stepping if I am) and sex is normal and healthy and should be done safely. End rant
item.dc:creator: EmmyZannaT

Previous Day 336: https://imgur.com/gallery/VBBzg4B MESSAGE ME BURGER PICS OR YOUR FAVORITE BURGER SPOTS! Map of all burger spots that are available on yelp! Big thanks to @OhBoyDoIHaveNews4U for this. Link to his post and map https://imgur.com/gallery/vcObDuD @CrisprCAS Daily Tag
item.dc:creator: crypto

item.title: EPIC! -- Fluke Skywalker with TheFreePizzaDude
item.description: At the ICCC in Nashville 04/30/22 (TFPD is really a cool guy to meet in person.) EDIT - Most Viral? Thank you my Dudes! I'll post more pix later. C-3PO (Tim O'Sullivan) and I met Anthony Daniels. He was looking down at a photo he was signing for me. When he looked up to see this guy with the crazy name of Fluke Skywalker, his face lit up. Big smile. He said, "Are you wearing makeup? I can't believe the resemblance! " I told him I had some makeup on my beard and a little in my hair. Only 2.5 feet away, he replied that the similarity was "Astounding." I told him I use the look to help charities that help sick kids and disabled veterans. "Well done," was the reply.
item.dc:creator: imflukeskywalker

item.title: Good Guy Boss
item.description: I have biweekly one-on-ones with my boss. He always tells me I'm doing great, but I always took it as something he's just saying. When I mentioned why I was bummed he got really pissed about things going sideways. It made me feel like he actually meant all the times he said I was doing great. I have imposter syndrome, and low self esteem, so this is the first time I actually believed something positive someone said about me.
item.dc:creator: BlowOnItAndStickItIn

item.title: Dumpety dump 28 - Things that made me blow air through my nose
item.description:
Totally.
It's a fine line.
My friend asked his kid if the car he saw was light white or dark white. Still laughing about that.
Accurate.
Those little peets
Rooney the Rabbit.
I love the idea of being off your tits on happiness.
I may have laughed way too hard at this.
item.dc:creator: IndependentDoodle

item.title: TLDR: Trying to interact with a manatee does more harm than good. You can look, but no touchy-touchy.
item.description:
A couple of hours ago, ViralHog released a “cute video” of some tourists giving a manatee some water. This is actually both not good for the animal, and is a federal crime. PLEASE DO NOT BOTHER THE MANATEES!! HERE’S WHY:
Here’s the video in question. Link: https://youtube.com/shorts/ftXc8XAHniM?feature=share
Manatees are especially vulnerable because they have no predators. They’re too big for other predatory animals to bother with them. Because of this, manateees don’t see things as threats like other animals do. They certainly get startled, and will move away from something they are afraid of. But they don’t have as intense of a “fight/flight” response. They see a human, they go to investigate. They don’t bite, or snarl, or show any aggression. If you give this non-aggressive WILD animal love and affection, they will associate humans with goodness, and more dangerously, will associate BOATS with goodness (because humans are on them). You can read more about that here: https://myfwc.com/education/wildlife/manatee/viewing-guidelines/
This is why it is very important that we do not bother the manatees. They are dying very quickly now. . Link: https://environmentamerica.org/blogs/environment-america-blog/ame/one-worst-years-manatees-ever
Manatees get struck by boat propellers frequently. If they survive the collision, they could still die from the wound getting infected. Manatees + boats = tragedy . Top image: https://www.savethemanatee.org/wp-content/uploads/2017/07/drs_manatee-with-multiple-boat-collision-scars_550.jpg Bottom Image: https://www.thedodo.com/boats-injure-florida-manatees-2368810374.html
The government does not fuck around when it comes to manatee protection. They don’t care if that Facebook photo is two weeks old - they will find you, and they will arrest you. Your ass will go to jail. Don’t pass go, and if you collect $200, you’ll immediately be paying that AND some in the $500+ fine. Article about four young people picture: https://cbs12.com/news/local/fwc-investigating-photo-of-people-touching-a-manatee Smithsonian article: https://www.smithsonianmag.com/smart-news/touch-a-manatee-spend-six-months-in-jail-24670630/
The best thing to do if you encounter a manatee in distress, is to call for expert help! There’s a hotline dedicated to the rescue of manatees! . https://myfwc.com/research/manatee/information/support/contact/
Manatee gonna manatee, let’s just watch them be manatees from a distance!
item.dc:creator: OlivetheNerd

item.title: You already like him - even if you don't know his name. Wilson Pickett
item.description:
This post comes with a challenge, which is this: Whoever you are - wherever you are - can you honestly tell me you didn't ALREADY love at least one of the songs in this post? For a guy with over 20 albums and 5 Grammy nominations, Wilson Pickett doesn't seem to be often mentioned in American pop culture - at least not enough for OP's tastes.
As is often the case, Wilson had some issues with drugs, alcohol & criminal behavior so OP makes no claims about everyone loving the GUY, but when it comes to the music... C'mon. He even did a solid Hey Jude with Duane Allman.
I'm not going to go into a "Behind the Music" with this one (https://imgur.com/gallery/kspCCaY) because this time it's just ABOUT the music.
Nothing but a Wilson Pickett Appreciation Post. #1 - In The Midnight Hour #2 - Mustang Sally #3 - Hey Jude #4 - Land of 1,000 Dances
item.dc:creator: Magnebro

item.title: The humans you celebrate speak volumes about your integrity.
